rationale: The company_context_block is essentially empty (all nulls/empty arrays for industry, geography, regulatory baseline, recurring matters, and stakeholders). The agent responded generically to the request for a DPA review by asking about file access. Given the empty context block, there was nothing substantive to integrate. The response 'I don't have access' is generic refusal behavior — it doesn't reference any persona-specific elements because none were provided in the briefing.
specific_gaps: company_context_block contains no actionable data (all nulls/empty arrays)
No industry, jurisdiction, or regulatory baseline was briefed for the agent to reference
Response is generic file-access question, not shaped by context
